name: Florentine Cups
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Honey Almond Delight brand (crushed to 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
To Prepare Base, preheat oven to 350°F. Grease 32 miniature (1 3/4") muffin cups. In a large bowl, combine cereal, coconut, raisins, flour, orange peel, baking powder and cinnamon; mix well and set aside. In a small saucepan, combine brown sugar, 1/3 cup butter and honey. Stir over medium heat until butter is melted and brown sugar is dissolved. Pour over cereal mixture; blend well. Place 1 tablespoon mixture in each prepared muffin cup; press firmly. Bake 8-10 minutes or until golden brown (cups will be soft). Cool in pan for 15 minutes. Loosen edges, invert onto wire racks, and cool completely.
To Prepare Icing, beat the butter, powdered sugar, and orange juice together in a small bowl until smooth. Using a pastry tube, pipe a decorative swirl on top of each cup. Garnish with sliced almonds. Makes 32 cups.
